pregunta: ¿Qué es Itz'ana Resort & Residences? / What is Itz'ana Resort?
respuesta: Itz'ana Resort & Residences is a luxury resort in Placencia, Belize (Mile 20 Placencia Road, Stann Creek District), bordered by the Caribbean Sea and tropical jungle. It offers beachfront villas, suites, penthouses, a spa, pristine white-sand beach, outdoor pool, organic garden, yoga terrace, and a full-service marina. Just minutes from the world's second-largest barrier reef — perfect for diving, snorkeling, fishing, and sailing. Website: www.itzanabelize.com

pregunta: ¿Qué tipos de alojamiento tienen? / What accommodation options do you have?
respuesta:
Itz'ana offers several accommodation types:
• Beachfront Villas (1, 2, and 3 bedrooms) — private terrace, plunge pool, steps from the beach
• Penthouses (2 and 3 bedrooms) — top-floor luxury with private plunge pool and sea views
• Beachfront Suite — king bed, living/dining area, private wrap-around terrace
• Deluxe Room — poolside retreat with private terrace and sofa bed

Prices vary by date and season. Book here: https://reservations.itzanabelize.com/book/accommodations

pregunta: ¿Cómo es la villa de 1 dormitorio? / Tell me about the 1-bedroom villa
respuesta:
Our 1-bedroom beachfront villa is a secluded retreat with breathtaking Caribbean Sea views. It features a private terrace with plunge pool, a fully equipped kitchen, luxurious linens, and is just steps from the beach. Perfect for couples seeking a private paradise.

Book: https://reservations.itzanabelize.com/book/accommodations

pregunta: ¿Cómo es la villa de 2 dormitorios? / Tell me about the 2-bedroom villa
respuesta:
Our 2-bedroom beachfront villa is surrounded by turquoise sea and white sand beach. It features a modern design, 2 bedrooms with en-suite bathrooms, open-concept living room and kitchen, and a sea-view terrace with plunge pool plus an interior courtyard pool. Ideal for families or small groups.

Book: https://reservations.itzanabelize.com/book/accommodations

pregunta: ¿Cómo es la villa de 3 dormitorios? / Tell me about the 3-bedroom villa
respuesta:
Our 3-bedroom villa opens directly onto Placencia Beach. With 1,470 sqm of living space designed in harmony with nature, it features a master bedroom with sea views, 2 plunge pools, an interior courtyard, and seamless indoor-outdoor flow. Services available include private chef, butler, spa in-villa, babysitter, and a stocked villa bar.

Book: https://reservations.itzanabelize.com/book/accommodations

pregunta: ¿Qué servicios adicionales hay para las villas? / What extra services are available for villas?
respuesta:
All villas can request these exclusive services:
• Private Chef — personalized Belizean cuisine with fresh, seasonal ingredients
• Butler Service — impeccable, professional attention for your entire stay
• In-Villa Spa — massages and body treatments with the sound of the sea
• Babysitter — so you can relax or explore while your children are cared for
• Villa Bar — stocked with premium spirits (vodka, gin, rum, tequila), beer, sodas, and water

Contact reservations@itzanabelize.com to arrange.

pregunta: ¿Cómo es el penthouse de 2 habitaciones? / Tell me about the 2-bedroom penthouse
respuesta:
Located on the top floor of the Resort Suites building, this 2-bedroom penthouse offers 287 sqm of beautifully designed interior and exterior space, including a chef's kitchen, integrated living and dining room, and a spacious terrace with a private pool and stunning views of the pool and Caribbean Sea.

Book: https://reservations.itzanabelize.com/book/accommodations

pregunta: ¿Cómo es el penthouse de 3 habitaciones? / Tell me about the 3-bedroom penthouse
respuesta:
Situated on the hotel's top floor with Caribbean Sea views, this 3-bedroom penthouse is a luxury retreat for groups, families, or couples. It features 3 bedrooms, 3.5 bathrooms, an inspiring design, and a large terrace with a plunge pool and sweeping ocean views.

Book: https://reservations.itzanabelize.com/book/accommodations

pregunta: ¿Cómo es la Beachfront Suite? / Tell me about the Beachfront Suite
respuesta:
Our Beachfront Suite features elegant decor and luxury details, a king bed, living and dining area, and a private wrap-around terrace on one of Belize's most beautiful beaches. Watch the sunset from the comfort of your suite.

Book: https://reservations.itzanabelize.com/book/accommodations

pregunta: ¿Cómo es la Deluxe Room? / Tell me about the Deluxe Room
respuesta:
The Deluxe Room is a poolside oasis for guests seeking tranquility. These thoughtfully designed rooms feature luxury amenities, a private terrace with a sofa bed, right next to the resort's sparkling pool.

Book: https://reservations.itzanabelize.com/book/accommodations

pregunta: ¿Cuánto cuesta la noche? / How much does a night cost? / How do I make a reservation?
respuesta:
Prices vary depending on the date, season, and accommodation type. To check real-time rates and availability and make a reservation, use our booking link: https://reservations.itzanabelize.com/book/accommodations

For personalized assistance, contact reservations@itzanabelize.com or WhatsApp +(501) 615-0674.

pregunta: ¿Qué es Limilia Restaurant? / Tell me about Limilia Restaurant
respuesta:
Limilia Restaurant celebrates fresh Caribbean flavors with a nod to the Garifuna people of Belize. Seasonal, seafood-based cuisine highlights locally sourced ingredients — vegetables and herbs from our organic farm, fresh catch by our own fishermen. Dine with a relaxing view of the pool and beach.

• Breakfast menu: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/ResourceFiles/restaurant-pdf-menus/breakfast-menu-compressed.pdf
• Lunch menu: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/ResourceFiles/restaurant-pdf-menus/lunch-menu.pdf
• Dinner menu: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/ResourceFiles/restaurant-pdf-menus/limilia-dinner.pdf
• Wine & cocktail menu: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/ResourceFiles/restaurant-pdf-menus/limilia-wine.pdf

Reservations: concierge@itzanabelize.com or +(501) 610-1329

pregunta: ¿Qué es Nadu? / What is Nadu restaurant?
respuesta:
Nadu (meaning 'tree' in Garifuna) is our exclusive pop-up dining experience under the trees, beachside. Sustainable cuisine with fresh, organic, seasonal ingredients — a farm-to-table concept. The menu changes daily based on local produce.

Available for groups of 15 or more. Advance reservation required.
Contact: concierge@itzanabelize.com or +(501) 610-1329

pregunta: ¿Qué bares y lounges tienen? / What bars and lounges do you have?
respuesta:
Itz'ana has several bars and lounges:
• Biblio Bar — craft cocktails, wine, beer, and delicious snacks
• Luna Bar — craft cocktails, wine, beer in a casual atmosphere. Menu: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/ResourceFiles/restaurant-pdf-menus/luna-bar.pdf
• Pool Bar — refreshing cocktails, tropical drinks, cold beers, wine. Menu: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/ResourceFiles/restaurant-pdf-menus/lunch-menu.pdf
• Rum Room — Caribbean and Central American rums curated by our sommelier in the Great House
• Private Owner's Lounge — exclusive for residents and their guests

pregunta: ¿Qué actividades y excursiones ofrecen? / What activities and excursions do you offer?
respuesta:
Itz'ana is the perfect base for Belizean adventures:
• Snorkeling and diving at the world's second-largest barrier reef
• Deep-sea and fly fishing
• Wildlife sanctuary night walks (jaguar spotting)
• Zip-lining through the jungle canopy
• Ancient Maya site explorations
• Sunset cruise on the Placencia Lagoon
• Cacao farm tours
• Sailing on pristine Caribbean waters

See all beach adventures: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/aventuras?adv=aventuras-y-excursiones-en-la-playa
Packages & promotions: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/especiales-paquetes?sp=Promociones

pregunta: ¿Tienen marina? / Do you have a marina?
respuesta:
Yes! Itz'ana has a full-service marina with 18 boat slips, a water sports activity center, fuel station, and supply store. It's the perfect base for fishing trips, diving, snorkeling, and sailing excursions.

Contact concierge@itzanabelize.com or +(501) 610-1329 for marina and activity bookings.

pregunta: ¿Qué servicios de spa y bienestar tienen? / What spa and wellness services do you offer?
respuesta:
Itz'ana Spa offers massages and body treatments by professional therapists — inside the spa or in your villa with the sound of the sea. We also have a yoga terrace with panoramic ocean and peninsula views.

To book spa treatments, contact: concierge@itzanabelize.com or +(501) 610-1329

pregunta: ¿Tienen paquetes o promociones especiales? / Do you have special packages or promotions?
respuesta:
Yes! Itz'ana offers curated packages designed to inspire relaxation, romance, and adventure — from couples' escapes to family adventures.

See all current packages and promotions: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/especiales-paquetes?sp=Promociones

For personalized quotes, contact reservations@itzanabelize.com

pregunta: ¿Hacen bodas y eventos especiales? / Do you host weddings and special events?
respuesta:
Itz'ana Resort & Residences is an exclusive, sophisticated setting for weddings and special events. We offer multiple stunning venues, personalized services, and even Mayan shaman ceremonies.

Venues available:
• Limilia Deck — outdoor, garden & sea views, up to 122 guests
• The Great House — elegant indoor space, up to 150 guests
• Yoga Deck — elevated, panoramic ocean views, up to 70 guests (intimate ceremonies)
• Private Beach — Caribbean backdrop, up to 150 guests

To start planning: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/bodas-eventos/empiece-a-planificar
Events calendar: https://www.itzanabelize.com/events
For quotes, contact: reservations@itzanabelize.com or +813-567-1059

pregunta: ¿Cuáles son los espacios para eventos y cuántas personas caben?
respuesta:
Itz'ana event venues:
• Limilia Deck — outdoor, garden/sea views, max 122 guests. Great for open-air dinners and receptions.
• The Great House — elegant indoor space, max 150 guests. Ideal for formal events and large receptions.
• Yoga Deck — elevated, panoramic ocean + peninsula views, max 70 guests. Perfect for intimate ceremonies.
• Private Beach — Caribbean Sea backdrop, max 150 guests. Unique open-air celebration on the sand.

Most common spaces: Playa and Limilia area, capacity up to 160–200 guests combined.

Note: The resort does not provide its own furniture/equipment — chairs, linens, sound systems must be rented from external suppliers (the resort can recommend trusted vendors).

pregunta: ¿Qué opciones de catering tienen para eventos? / What catering options do you have for events?
respuesta:
Itz'ana offers 4 buffet options for events (30–100 guests), priced per person (taxes and service charges not included):

• Mediterranean Buffet — fresh salads, ceviches, soups, Mediterranean-inspired mains
• Classic American Buffet — salads, sushi, soups, quality American-style cuts
• Meet & Grill Buffet — grilled meats and seafood, bold flavors, asado style
• Caribbean Vibes Buffet — local Caribbean flavors, tropical fruits, fresh seafood

For pricing and availability, contact reservations@itzanabelize.com

pregunta: ¿Tienen servicio de barra abierta para eventos? / Do you offer open bar service for events?
respuesta:
Yes! Three open bar tiers available (priced per person per hour):

• Relax Open Bar — Stolichnaya, Absolut, Beefeater Gin. Starting from USD $32/person/hour.
• Deluxe Open Bar — Ketel One, Titos Vodka, Bombay. Premium pricing per hours contracted.
• Premium Open Bar — Belvedere, Grey Goose, Zacapa 23. Luxury pricing.

Extra hourly charges apply. Corkage fee available if you bring your own wine/champagne.

For a detailed quote, contact reservations@itzanabelize.com

pregunta: ¿Con quién contacto para organizar un evento o boda? / Who do I contact to plan a wedding or event?
respuesta:
To get a quote or start planning your event or wedding, contact our events team:

📧 reservations@itzanabelize.com
📞 +813-567-1059
📱 WhatsApp: +(501) 615-0674

Start planning online: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/bodas-eventos/empiece-a-planificar

We also offer unique Mayan shaman ceremonies, customizable to your beliefs and preferences.

pregunta: ¿Dónde están ubicados? / Where is Itz'ana located?
respuesta:
Itz'ana Resort & Residences is located on the Placencia Peninsula, Stann Creek District, southeast Belize.

Address: Mile 20 Placencia Road, Placencia, Stann Creek District, Belize

The resort is 20 minutes from Placencia Village and 3.5 hours by car from Belize City and Philip S.W. Goldson International Airport.

pregunta: ¿Cómo llegar a Itz'ana? / How do I get to Itz'ana?
respuesta:
You can reach Itz'ana by land, air, or sea:

• By Land: 3.5 hours drive from Belize City and Philip S.W. Goldson International Airport.
• By Air: Domestic flight to Placencia Airstrip (short drive to the resort). Several airlines offer connections from Belize City.
• By Sea: Scenic arrival by boat.

Complimentary bikes are available for exploring the Placencia Peninsula once you arrive.

pregunta: ¿Tienen shuttles, golf carts o taxis? / Do you have shuttles, golf carts, or taxis?
respuesta:
• Shuttles to Maya Beach and Placencia Village — available (schedule may vary, confirm with our concierge upon arrival).
• Golf carts — available for rent (pricing provided by our team).
• Taxis — our concierge can arrange for you.
• Complimentary bikes — free to use for exploring the peninsula.

Contact concierge@itzanabelize.com or +(501) 610-1329 to arrange transportation.

pregunta: ¿Cómo puedo contactar al resort? / How can I contact Itz'ana?
respuesta:
You can reach Itz'ana Resort & Residences through:

📧 Reservations: reservations@itzanabelize.com
📧 Concierge / Restaurant / Adventures: concierge@itzanabelize.com
📧 Partnerships & PR: partnerships@itzanabelize.com
📞 Main: +813-567-1059
📱 WhatsApp: +(501) 615-0674
📞 Belize local: +501-523-3250
📞 Restaurant Limilia / Adventures: +(501) 610-1329
🌐 Website: www.itzanabelize.com

pregunta: ¿Tienen vacantes de trabajo? / Do you have job openings?
respuesta:
For current job openings at Itz'ana Resort & Residences, please check our official website at www.itzanabelize.com or contact our HR department directly at reservations@itzanabelize.com.

Our team will be happy to share information about current opportunities.

pregunta: ¿Trabajan con influencers o colaboraciones? / Do you work with influencers or collaborations?
respuesta:
Yes! Itz'ana is open to creative partnerships and media collaborations. Please send your proposal to our partnerships team:

📧 partnerships@itzanabelize.com

Include details about your project and how you'd like to work together. Our team will review and get back to you.

pregunta: ¿Aceptan mascotas? / Are you pet friendly?
respuesta:
⚠️ DATO PENDIENTE — Our pet policy is currently being confirmed with the hotel team. For the most accurate information about bringing pets, please contact us directly:

📧 reservations@itzanabelize.com
📱 WhatsApp: +(501) 615-0674

Our team will be happy to clarify the current policy for your stay.

pregunta: ¿Son todo incluido? / Are you all-inclusive?
respuesta:
No, Itz'ana Resort & Residences is not an all-inclusive property. Accommodation is booked separately, and dining, spa treatments, and activities are offered à la carte.

However, we do offer curated packages that bundle accommodation with experiences. Check our promotions: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/especiales-paquetes?sp=Promociones

pregunta: ¿Qué instalaciones y amenidades tiene el resort? / What facilities does the resort have?
respuesta:
Itz'ana Resort & Residences features:
• Private white-sand beach
• Outdoor swimming pool
• Full-service marina with 18 boat slips and water sports center
• Itz'ana Spa
• Yoga terrace with ocean views
• Organic garden (fresh herbs and vegetables for the kitchen)
• The Shop at Itz'ana — exclusive clothing and resort boutique
• Multiple restaurants and bars (Limilia, Nadu, Biblio Bar, Luna Bar, Pool Bar, Rum Room)
• Private Owner's Lounge
